tools.name: search_interfaces
tools.description: Use to discover public liked Gravity AI UI interface drafts by title, summary, or id. This returns public gallery metadata only. Use get_interface when you need the full payload or React code for a known id.

tools.name: get_interface
tools.description: Use when you already have a public Gravity AI UI gallery id and need the sanitized public interface metadata, composed payload, thumbnail URLs, page URL, and copyable React code.

tools.name: generate_interface
tools.description: Use to generate a new Gravity AI UI composed interface from a prompt. This calls the public generator with the server OpenAI configuration and does not save or publish the result.

tools.name: refine_interface
tools.description: Use to refine a previously generated Gravity AI UI composed payload with a natural-language instruction. This does not save or publish the result.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_interface · Public sink: generate_interface, refine_interface.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_interface · Public sink: generate_interface, refine_interface

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
